title: Creaki-chan
description: Our new Creaking mob. but is this sound teribble?
body:
### Creaki-chan Mod Description ### 
Creaki-chan is a variant of the newly introduced Creaking mob.

In the Cherry Grove biome, you can find a special item called the Creakichan Heart within customized trees.

When a Creakichan Heart forms, it summons a Creaki-chan.

Creaki-chan is linked to the Creakichan Heart log. If the log is broken, Creaki-chan will despawn; otherwise, it is nearly invincible.

When you hit Creaki-chan, it shows hearts indicating the location of its linked log.

Breaking the Creakichan Heart log gives you a Broken Creaki-chan Heart.

Placing this block summons another version of Creaki-chan, which attacks all monster-type mobs.

This summoned Creaki-chan will also despawn once its log is broken.

Creaki-chan moves very fast but when you look at it it almost never moves
